info.title: Employee Onboarding HRMS API
info.description: Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for the Employee Onboarding HRMS backend. Most endpoints return `{ status, message?, data? }` and protected routes require a JWT bearer token.

get.summary: Get the current employee profile and documents
Get the current employee onboarding status
Get verification audit trail for the current employee

post.description: Roles: employee, intern. Draft payload is intentionally flexible.

get.summary: Get the current employee draft profile

post.description: Roles: employee, intern. Multipart fields: aadhaar, pan, passbook, passport, resume.

patch.summary: Submit an onboarding section for review

get.summary: Get employee detail for admin review

patch.summary: Approve or reject an onboarding section
Forward an employee profile to super admin

get.summary: Get employee detail for final review

patch.summary: Perform final employee approval or rejection

post.summary: Create an admin, super admin, or intern account

get.description: Roles: admin, super_admin. Reads Employee_Master and Attendance_Log tabs, joins rows by Emp ID, and computes two-shift attendance status.

parameters.name: sheet
parameters.description: Legacy alias for the attendance log sheet/tab name.

get.description: Admins see all matching requests; employees and interns see their own when using /my-requests.

get.summary: Get the current employee's leave balance
List leave requests for the current employee
Get leave balance for one employee

patch.description: Current implementation deletes the notification after viewing.

get.summary: List payroll records for current employee
List payroll records for an employee

ProfileWithDocumentsAndLogsSuccess.description: Employee profile, documents, and verification logs response

newPassword.description: Must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.

comments.description: Required with at least 10 characters when rejecting.
Required with at least 5 characters when rejecting.
Required with at least 10 characters when rejecting.

earnings.description: Required with at least one item when fixedSalary is omitted.
